Visitors to Lisbon would find this restaurant appealing for its unique combination of high-altitude dining with panoramic city views, making it ideal for special occasions or memorable meals. Visitors to the new location will now have access to A-100's cuisine without having to travel to the Lisbon metropolitan area.
